groq.notes: OpenAI-compatible Groq API. Model list should be probed before a full run.
groq.quota_notes: Use model-specific conservative RPM because Groq preview/production limits vary by model; all selected models remain below 320 RPD/model for this benchmark.

cerebras.notes: OpenAI-compatible Cerebras Inference API. Conservative per-model RPM for free-tier runs.
cerebras.quota_notes: Free-tier planning assumption: 5 RPM/model, 30K TPM/model, 1M TPD/model; run at 4 RPM/model.

mistral.notes: Mistral chat completions API. Current limits should be checked in the console/headers.
mistral.quota_notes: Use model-specific conservative RPM/RPS. Combined Mistral schedule is kept near or below 1 RPS to reduce free-tier 429 risk.

google.quota_notes: Supplementary provider. OpenAI-compatible Gemini endpoint. Run 20-prompt probe before scaling.

nvidia.quota_notes: Supplementary provider via NVIDIA Integrate OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Probe 20 prompts first; do not hard-fail core benchmark.

models.limits: supplementary; exact active limits must be checked in AI Studio; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 4 after 20-prompt probe hit short-window 429s at rpm=10
supplementary; exact active limits must be checked in AI Studio; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 4 after 20-prompt probe hit short-window 429s at rpm=10
supplementary; use 20 RPM safety margin; exact daily/token cap unclear; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 10 after one transient worker-local 503 at rpm=20
models.notes: Configured from NVIDIA Integrate sample. Runner uses non-streamed chat completions with temperature=0, top_p=1, max_tokens=180.

models.limits: supplementary; use 20 RPM safety margin; exact daily/token cap unclear; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 10 after one transient worker-local 503 at rpm=20
models.notes: Configured from NVIDIA Integrate sample. Runner uses non-streamed chat completions with temperature=0, top_p=1, max_tokens=180.

models.limits: supplementary; use 20 RPM safety margin; exact daily/token cap unclear; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 10 after one transient worker-local 503 at rpm=20
models.notes: Chosen as third NVIDIA supplementary model from NVIDIA Build recent free endpoints: flagship LLM for agentic workflows, coding, and long-horizon reasoning.

models.limits: supplementary; use 20 RPM safety margin; exact daily/token cap unclear; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 10 after one transient worker-local 503 at rpm=20
models.notes: Chosen as additional NVIDIA supplementary model: independent DeepSeek family, MoE, coding/agentic reasoning; avoids soon-deprecated Kimi K2.6 and redundant Mistral family overlap.

models.limits: supplementary baseline; use 20 RPM safety margin; exact daily/token cap unclear; 20-prompt probe first; full-run safety rpm set to 10 after one transient worker-local 503 at rpm=20
models.notes: Added as a widely recognized NVIDIA-hosted Meta Llama baseline. Not a headline frontier model; useful for comparison against newer Nemotron/GLM/DeepSeek hosted models.

supplementary_provider_policy.scale_rule: Run full 320 prompts only after 20-prompt probe has acceptable error/429 rate.
supplementary_provider_policy.expanded_target: 19 models × 320 prompts = 6,080 raw outputs with Google and five NVIDIA supplementary models active.
